  • Uses of Game.GameView in edu.bu.pas.uno.agents

    Methods in edu.bu.pas.uno.agents with parameters of type Game.GameView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract Move
    Agent.chooseCardToPlay(Game.GameView game)
    An abstract method that is called by the game logic when this Agent has legal moves available.
    Move
    MCTSAgent.chooseCardToPlay(Game.GameView game)
    A method that is called by the game logic when this Agent has legal moves available.
    Move
    RandomAgent.chooseCardToPlay(Game.GameView game)
     
    abstract Move
    Agent.maybePlayDrawnCard(Game.GameView game, int drawnCardIdx)
    An abstract method that is called by the game logic when this Agent was forced to drawn a single card and that card is playable.
    Move
    MCTSAgent.maybePlayDrawnCard(Game.GameView game, int drawnCardIdx)
    A method that is called by the game logic when this Agent was forced to drawn a single card and that card is playable.
    Move
    RandomAgent.maybePlayDrawnCard(Game.GameView game, int drawnCardIdx)
     
    abstract Node
    MCTSAgent.search(Game.GameView game, Integer drawnCardIdx)
     
    final Move
    MCTSAgent.timedSearch(Game.GameView game, Integer drawnCardIdx)
    A method to call search and argmaxQValues asynchonously with a pre-determined amount of execution time.
